description.ja: 量子化学特徴量、機械学習、不確かさ評価を統合し、電子状態と分子機能の関係を発見します。
description.en: We integrate quantum-chemical descriptors, machine learning, and uncertainty-aware prediction to uncover relationships between electronic states and molecular functions.

description.ja: 複雑な分子環境の電子応答に応じて、計算領域と精度を適応的に決定する量子シミュレーションを開発します。
description.en: We develop quantum simulations that adapt their computational region and resolution to the electronic response of complex environments.

description.ja: 電子と原子核の量子性を同時に扱い、プロトン移動、同位体効果、立体化学、反応性を解明します。
description.en: We investigate coupled electronic and nuclear quantum effects in proton transfer, isotope effects, stereochemistry, and reactivity.
